channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's "Great Man" theory: "No limits" to his power
item.description: President Trump declared on "The Axios Show" on Thursday that he's discovered "no limits" to his power since going to war with Iran. A forthcoming book details his views.

item.title: Juneteenth becomes a quiet holiday as DEI efforts recede
item.description: Juneteenth persists despite corporate pullback from DEI promises that helped elevate it. Why it matters: ...

item.title: How a democratic socialist won big in D.C.
item.description: A democratic socialist's victory in the D.C. mayoral race signals younger urban voters are boosting candidates who promise ...

item.title: Vance delays trip to Switzerland for Iran talks
item.description: Vice President JD Vance postponed a planned trip to Switzerland for U.S.-Iran talks expected to begin Friday, the White House said. Why it matters: T...
